title: DIPROM and Bangchak Join Forces with Five Business Partners to Drive Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) Development. Advancing the Future of Aviation Toward the Net Zero Goal
content: To speed up the development of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF), the Thai government, through the Ministry of Industry (MOI), is partnering with six major local companies and their affiliates to establish a waste cooking oil-based SAF feedstock supply chain. This collaboration aims to help decarbonize Thailandâ€™s aviation sector and support the countryâ€™s renewable energy goals.
author: Analysts Account
